summary: Mobile API v1 testing completed successfully. All 34 backend API tests passed. Fixed 2 minor bugs during testing: 1) is_pro field missing from /signals/latest when no signals exist, 2) notification preferences not merging with defaults.

minor.issue: ETag headers are set by backend but stripped by Cloudflare/proxy. ETag is available in response body meta field for signals endpoint.
minor.note: This is a proxy/CDN configuration issue, not a code issue. Mobile clients can use etag from meta field.

passed_tests: GET /api/v1/health - Health check returns status=ok, timestamp, version
GET /api/v1/config - Mobile app configuration with features, endpoints, refresh_intervals, pagination
POST /api/v1/auth/login - Mobile login with expires_in (86400s), slim user object
POST /api/v1/auth/login with device_id - Device tracking on login
GET /api/v1/auth/me - Get profile with all fields
GET /api/v1/signals - Paginated signals with pagination object and etag in meta
GET /api/v1/signals with If-None-Match - ETag caching support
GET /api/v1/signals/latest - Single latest signal with is_pro field
GET /api/v1/portfolio/summary - Dashboard widget data with paper_balance, pnl, positions
POST /api/v1/trading/execute BUY - Trade execution returns trade_id, value, new_balance
POST /api/v1/devices/register - Device registration for push notifications (Expo format)
GET /api/v1/devices - List registered devices (push_token not exposed)
GET /api/v1/notifications/preferences - Get preferences with defaults merged
GET /api/v1/metrics/summary - Mobile metrics widget with win_rate, pnl, trades
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile API v1 is well-implemented with proper versioning (/api/v1/ prefix)
Pagination implemented correctly with page, limit, total, total_pages, has_next, has_prev
Field selection (?fields=id,name) works correctly for profile and signals
ETag caching implemented - etag available in meta field (header stripped by CDN)
Push notification device registration supports Expo, iOS, Android platforms
Notification preferences properly merge with defaults now
JWT authentication works correctly with expires_in for mobile token management
All authenticated endpoints properly return 401 for unauthorized access
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/mobile_v1.py - Fixed is_pro missing from /signals/latest when no signals, Fixed notification preferences not merging with defaults
/app/backend/tests/test_mobile_v1_api.py - Created comprehensive Mobile API v1 tests (34 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test devices registered during testing, test trades executed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile API v1 fully functional. All 17 endpoints tested and working. Test user (test@example.com) has registered devices and notification preferences. Push notification service (push_notifications.py) is implemented but actual push sending requires EXPO_ACCESS_TOKEN env var. ETag headers are set by backend but stripped by Cloudflare - mobile clients should use etag from response body meta field instead.

features_verified.auth_endpoints: ✅ /api/v1/auth/login, /api/v1/auth/refresh, /api/v1/auth/me - All working with expires_in and field selection
features_verified.signals_endpoints: ✅ /api/v1/signals, /api/v1/signals/latest - Pagination, field selection, ETag caching working
features_verified.portfolio_endpoints: ✅ /api/v1/portfolio/summary, /api/v1/portfolio/positions - Dashboard widget and paginated positions working
features_verified.notification_preferences: ✅ /api/v1/notifications/preferences GET/PUT - Preferences with quiet_hours support working

bugs_fixed.description: is_pro field missing from /api/v1/signals/latest response when no signals exist
bugs_fixed.fix: Added is_pro to the response when signal is None

bugs_fixed.description: Notification preferences not merging with defaults - partial updates would lose default fields
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to merge existing preferences with defaults using {**default_prefs, **prefs}
